risks.description: Vendor delivery delayed by 2 weeks, threatening NGIS Phase 3 migration timeline
risks.evidence_excerpt: vendor confirmed 2-week delay on network equipment

risks.description: No backup supplier identified for critical network equipment — single-sourced risk
risks.evidence_excerpt: currently single-sourced on this product line

risks.description: Status report states 'no risks identified' but vendor delay and compliance findings exist — reporting inconsistency
risks.evidence_excerpt: No new risks or issues to report this week
risks.note: Contradicts Sprint Review minutes which document vendor delay and TBS audit finding

risks.description: Budget variance reported as $5,000 favourable, but middleware costs not yet surfaced
Budget overrun of $340,000 (14%) buried in appendix — not surfaced in executive summary
risks.evidence_excerpt: estimated cost of this remediation is $340,000, representing approximately 14% above the approved envelope

risks.description: Three-week schedule slip acknowledged as 'slight adjustment' — timeline at risk
risks.evidence_excerpt: required a slight adjustment of approximately three weeks from the original internal planning estimate

risks.description: Key AD migration expert (Bob Morrison) may leave SSC within 60 days — single point of failure
risks.evidence_excerpt: Bob Morrison has indicated he is exploring external opportunities and may be leaving SSC within 60 days

risks.description: Migration script depends on deprecated legacy-sync API scheduled for decommission April 1
risks.evidence_excerpt: current migration script relies on the deprecated 'legacy-sync' API endpoint scheduled for decommission on April 1

risks.description: ITSG-33 IA-5 compliance finding — PAW architecture documentation missing from SA&A package
risks.evidence_excerpt: SA&A package is missing the Privileged Access Workstation (PAW) architecture documentation required under ITSG-33 Annex 3A

risks.description: PBMM cloud hosting authorization may be placed on hold affecting GC-Cloud workloads
risks.evidence_excerpt: SSC's PBMM cloud hosting authorization may be placed on hold

inconsistencies.description: Director's Briefing Note (Pair A) states 'no budget concerns' and project is 'within budget', while Finance Committee Briefing (Pair B) reports a confirmed $340,000 budget overrun (14% above approved envelope)
inconsistencies.doc_a_excerpt: We have no budget concerns at this time and expect to deliver within the approved envelope
inconsistencies.doc_b_excerpt: budget overrun of $340,000 (approximately 14% above approved envelope)

inconsistencies.description: Pair A describes risk profile as 'low' with no escalations required, while Pair B flags the project for 'enhanced monitoring' and describes timeline as 'at risk'
inconsistencies.doc_a_excerpt: risk profile is low. Our risk register contains three risks, all rated Low. No risk escalations are required
inconsistencies.doc_b_excerpt: Finance Committee should flag this project for enhanced monitoring. Timeline at risk
